name: Bidda Sovereign Intelligence
description: 9,762 source-verified compliance nodes across 39 sovereign pillars. MCP server for regulatory compliance intelligence, built to reduce hallucination by grounding every node in a primary legal source. Covers EU AI Act, GDPR, HIPAA, DORA, Basel III, FATF, NIS2, NIST AI RMF, ISO 27001, MiCA, POPIA and 150+ frameworks, plus a MITRE cross-cut layer (ATT&CK, D3FEND, ATLAS, CAPEC). Public CISA Secure by Design Pledge signatory.
